title: aster nummulariifolius
intro: Aster nummulariifolius, also known as Chinese alpine aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster nummulariifolius are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
